heroHeadline:
US & Israel Strike Iran,
Killing Supreme Leader Khamenei
heroSubtitle: Operation Epic Fury launched February 28. Day 12: Hegseth vows 'most intense day' of strikes — 5,000+ targets hit total; Iran mines Strait of Hormuz, US destroys 16 mine-laying vessels; oil prices swing 17% on mixed signals; IEA eyes record reserve release. Iran missile rate down 92%. Lebanon: 570+ dead, 750,000 displaced. 140 US personnel wounded. No ceasefire in sight.
footerNote: Data compiled from 90+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 11, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
